message:
fix(scipy): prevent duplicate entries for self-loops in to_scipy_sparse_array

Skip the symmetric (j,i) entry when i==j so self-loops are counted once
instead of twice in the sparse adjacency matrix for undirected graphs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1058,7 +1058,7 @@ def to_scipy_sparse_array(G, nodelist=None, dtype=None, weight='weight',
             row.append(i)
             col.append(j)
             data.append(w)
-            if not G.is_directed():
+            if not G.is_directed() and i != j:
                 row.append(j)
                 col.append(i)
                 data.append(w)
